prompt_text:
### Demographics: 55-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 63.5 kg; Height 162.6 cm; BMI 24.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 121/62 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.6%; 9 months ago 8.8%; 6 months ago 8.9%; 3 months ago 8.4%; current 8.4%), FPG (12 months ago 205mg/dL; 9 months ago 202mg/dL; 6 months ago 248mg/dL; 3 months ago 193mg/dL; current 184mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 61.9kg; 9 months ago 64.2kg; 6 months ago 61.7kg; 3 months ago 64.9kg; current 63.5kg), Height (12 months ago 162.6cm; 9 months ago 162.6cm; 6 months ago 162.6cm; 3 months ago 162.6cm; current 162.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 121mmHg; current 121mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 61mmHg; 9 months ago 61mmHg; 6 months ago 61mmHg; 3 months ago 61mmHg; current 62mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 12U/L; 6 months ago 10U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 14U/L), AST (12 months ago 30U/L; 9 months ago 28U/L; 6 months ago 22U/L; 3 months ago 28U/L; current 25U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; current 22mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 125mg/g; 9 months ago 186mg/g; 6 months ago 152mg/g; 3 months ago 173mg/g; current 198mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 72mg/dL; 6 months ago 77mg/dL; 3 months ago 77mg/dL; current 74mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 51mg/dL; 9 months ago 52mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 50mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 96mg/dL; 9 months ago 101mg/dL; 6 months ago 112mg/dL; 3 months ago 115mg/dL; current 107mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.8g/dL; current 9.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
